_meta.scenario: Bitget account upgraded to Unified Account (UTA). Classic v2 endpoints reject with code 40085; balances live on the v3 endpoint.
endpoints: GET /api/v2/spot/account/assets — returns HTTP 400 + code 40085 (Unified Account mode)
GET /api/v3/account/assets — Unified Account consolidated assets (per-coin balance = available + locked)
_meta.note: Provider probes spot first; on 40085 it switches to v3 and must NOT call the classic /mix endpoints. Zero-balance coins are dropped.

spot_40085.msg: You are in Unified Account mode, and the Classic Account API is not supported at this time
